en: You are the ugliest woman I've ever seen in my entire life. In my entire life.
ko: 당신은 내가 평생 본 가장 못생긴 여자예요. 평생.

en: I guarantee you, if you went out right now
into the city streets and just started running full speed,
people would flee like you were Godzilla.
ko: 사람들은 당신을 보고 도망칠 거예요. 마치 고질라처럼.

en: So... Line up. Here we go.
Oh, God. I'm gonna kill myself. Okay, this makes total sense.
ko: 오, 신이시여. 자살하고 싶어요. 이건 완전히 이해가 가요.

en: So, it's me, then multiple beautiful women.
ko: 그러니까, 저와 여러 아름다운 여성들이 있는 거군요.

en: Build up that confidence. Build up that confidence.
What Joe doesn't know is that there's no fashion show. All those models are fake.
ko: 조가 모르는 것은 패션쇼가 없다는 거예요. 모든 모델은 가짜예요.

en: He's gonna play a software developer
giving a speech on brand-new apps to techies.
ko: 최신 앱에 대해 기술자들에게 연설할 거예요.

en: Yeah. To informed techies who know what they're talking about. Well, dressed like that. Guys, I'm next.
ko: 네. 자신이 아는 기술자들에게요. 그런 복장으로. 여러분, 제가 다음이에요.

en: If I fall, just play natural. Work it, buddy. Work it, buddy. Yeah, that's it.
ko: 제가 넘어지면, 자연스럽게 행동하세요. 잘 해봐요, 친구. 잘 해봐요, 친구. 그래, 그거예요.

en: None of these people are expecting a fashion show. Good luck with the presentation.
ko: 이 사람들은 패션쇼를 기대하지 않고 있어요. 발표 잘 하세요.
